title: Health Time
desc: Bringing the best in television.

title: Hit Chart
desc: Tune into a comprehensive compilation of some of the latest and most popular songs performed by various artists.

title: Manoharam
desc: Manu, a talented poster artist, struggles to find work with the advent of digital technology. After being jilted by his fiancee, he attempts to rebuild his life.

title: Nostalgia
desc: Enjoy a heartwarming collection of timeless classics that shaped musical history, evoking powerful emotions and memories that remain fresh even today.

title: Dileep
desc: Dileep is a popular Malayalam actor known for his versatile roles and comedy, starring in over 150 films and winning multiple awards for his impactful performances.

title: Kamal
desc: Enjoy a playlist of top Malayalam songs from renowned musicians and singers, non-stop!

title: Omana Thinkal
desc: Directed by Yatheendra Das and produced by Kora George. The film stars Kaviyoor Ponnamma, Venu Nagavally, Baby Anju and Babu Namboothiri in the lead roles.

title: 1980S
desc: A comprehensive collection of the most popular and melodious Malayalam songs from the 1980s, playing one after another to bring back the golden era's nostalgic musical charm.

title: Golli Soda
desc: A comprehensive collection of some of the most popular songs performed by renowned artists and bands played back to back.

title: Lets Dance
desc: Let's Dance features electrifying dance performances by talented pairs and solo dancers, showcasing a vibrant variety of styles in a thrilling, fast-paced format that captivates viewers throughout.

title: Revathi
desc: A comprehensive compilation of popular Malayalam songs from movies featuring Indian actress Revathy is played back to back.

title: Dew Drops
desc: Enjoy a playlist of top Malayalam songs from renowned musicians and singers, non-stop!

title: Ishq
desc: Enjoy a playlist of top Malayalam songs from renowned musicians and singers, non-stop!

title: Neela Kuyil
desc: Jaisurya, a journalist who is already engaged to his lover Rani, is forced to marry Chittu, a village girl, when he goes to a remote area to cover a story.

title: Venugopal Hits
desc: Venugopal Hits features a timeless collection of romantic and evergreen Malayalam film songs, capturing the soulful and melodious essence of G. Venugopal's celebrated singing career.

title: Gireesh
desc: A comprehensive compilation of some of the hit songs written and composed by Gireesh Puthenchery, a prominent Malayalam lyricist.

title: Kana Marayathu
desc: Sherly, an orphan, falls in love with Roy not knowing that he is her financial supporter. But Roy keeps his distance from her due to their age gap.

title: Poornima
desc: Despite being in love with each other, Purnima and Prakash end up marrying Vasant and Vandana respectively. Things take an unexpected turn when Vasant and Vandana die in a car accident.

title: Devaragam
desc: Vishnu and Lakshmi fall in love. But Lakshmi's father accepts a wedding proposal against her wish.

title: Isai Thendral
desc: Famous playback singers present some of the most popular songs in their discography that helped them define and advance their careers.

title: Meera
desc: Meera's life changes after she witnesses a policeman committing a murder. He then vows to kill her, but Jeeva, a man who falls in love with her, takes it upon himself to protect her.

title: Siby Hits
desc: Siby Hits showcases a curated selection of iconic Malayalam film songs, celebrating timeless hits with captivating performances that revive the essence of classic music eras beautifully.

title: Ever Green
desc: A comprehensive compilation of some of the hit evergreen songs written and composed by famous artists and musicians from all over the country.

title: Karthika
desc: Deepa, a dark-skinned girl, is treated badly by her fair-skinned sister. She gets married to Dr Karthik but has to fight societal and family pressures in order to lead a happy married life.

title: Onv
desc: Ottaplakkal Neelakandan Velu Kurup was a Malayalam poet and lyricist from Kerala, India, who won the Jnanpith Award, the highest literary award in India.

title: Best Of 90'S
desc: A nostalgic musical journey through the unforgettable hits of the 1990s, capturing the magic of melodies that defined an entire generation of music lovers.
